text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...That's weird. I thought someone was calling
me...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Could this be a message from the Three
Goddesses?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm the chosen one! Behold my newfound power!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Real life isn't like a cartoon. That sure
would be fun, though...
